MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-521092, CGC-12-523821 WITH CASE CGC-12-519185
Off Calendar Mar-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT CAL-PACIFIC CONSTRUCTION, INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-521092, CGC-12-523821 WITH CASE CGC-12-519185 is Granted in its entirety. Cases 519185, 521092, and 523821 are consolidated for all purposes. Case 519185 shall be designated the lead case and all filings shall be under that case number only. The consolidated action is compelled to arbitrate in accordance with the parties' written arbitration agreements. This case is stayed pending arbitration. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/AJR)

Defendant Cal-Pacific Construction, Inc.'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Feb-20-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. Defendant Cal-Pacific Construction, Inc.'s Motion For Protective Order AND Request For Judicial Notice IS denied as moot. Plaintiff must file a motion to compel further responses should it wish further responses to the discovery propounded. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge ProTem: Elizabeth Riles, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella; Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Peter Kerle, Omni Law Group, 408.879.8500, appearing for the Plaintiff;
Patricia Walsh, Leonidou & Rosin, 650.691.2888, appearing for the Defendant.

The parties appear by Court Call to continue the February 20, 2013, date that was set per the Court's tentative ruling. There being no agreement to a new and different date by Counsel, DEFENDANT CAL-PACIFIC CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S Motion For Protective Order; Request For Judicial Notice is continued to February 20, 2013.
